mapper.sql: dept.dept_key, dept.upper_dept_key, dept.dept_name, dept.use_yn, dept.sort_index, dept.reg_date, dept.mod_date, dept.reg_user_key, dept.mod_user_key
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO common_dept (dept_key, upper_dept_key, dept_name, use_yn, sort_index, reg_date, mod_date, reg_user_key, mod_user_key) VALUES (#{deptKey}, #{upperDeptKey}, #{deptName}, #{useYn}, #{sortIndex}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{regUserKey}, #{regUserKey})
